Among those mentioned here, TNF-alpha and IL-6 are directly linked to the intracellular killing processes facilitated by macrophages. Specifically, IL-6, along with other cytokines, helps coordinate the immune response, promoting the clearance of intracellular pathogens by enhancing the functions of immune cells like macrophages.
